description_long: This modern bungalow is set on a rectangular plot surrounded by dense, mature trees, providing privacy and a natural backdrop. The building features a flat roof with a rooftop terrace, which includes a pool and lounge area, accessible from the upper floor. The front facade has a clean, geometric design with large windows and a covered entryway, while the rear opens to a spacious backyard with a patio and garden. A detached single-car garage sits to the left of the main structure, connected by a paved driveway. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, contrasting with the dark roof and window frames. The landscaping is well-maintained, with a mix of grass, shrubs, and flowering trees enhancing the residential appeal.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a rooftop terrace and pool, surrounded by mature trees and landscaped gardens. Features a detached garage, large windows, and a spacious backyard patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, driveway, detached garage, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and dense tree coverage along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by tall trees, with glimpses of the backyard and rooftop terrace visible above the foliage.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the backyard patio, garden, and the side of the bungalow with additional windows and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
